pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate the project compiler settings from Java 11 to Java 17 using the modern 'release' flag.
Upgrade the Quarkus platform BOM from version 1.5.2.Final to 2.8.2.Final.
Update the Quarkus BOM artifact ID and group ID to match the new platform structure in Quarkus 2.x.
Upgrade the Maven Surefire plugin to version 3.0.0-M5 to support Java 17 and newer test features.
Explicitly add the quarkus-arc dependency, which may be required or recommended in newer Quarkus versions.
Refactor the Quarkus Maven plugin configuration to use the platform group ID and enable extensions.
Add generate-code and generate-code-tests goals to the Quarkus Maven plugin execution.
Move the -parameters compiler argument from properties to the maven-compiler-plugin configuration.
Pass the maven.home system property to the Surefire and Failsafe plugins.
Explicitly set the java.util.logging.manager system property in the Failsafe plugin configuration.
Disable the module path for the Failsafe plugin to ensure compatibility with the new Java version setup.
Rename the project artifact ID to better reflect its purpose as a demo.
Update the project version format to include a minor version number.
Update the Maven POM XSD schema location to use HTTPS.

.dockerignore.general_idea: Include the Quarkus application directory in the Docker build context to support the native or optimized jar structure introduced in newer Quarkus versions.

.github/workflows/mvn-build.yml.general_idea: Pin the setup-jdk GitHub Action to a specific commit SHA instead of a tag for improved security and reproducibility.
Update the java-version input format from 'openjdk11' to '11' to align with the action's expected input schema.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Switch the base image from an OpenJDK 8 Alpine variant to a Red Hat UBI8 OpenJDK 11 image to align with the target Java version.
Update the COPY commands to match the new Quarkus native/JVM runner directory structure (quarkus-app) instead of the legacy flat target directory.
Enforce running the container as a non-root user (UID 185) for security compliance.
Update environment variables to point to the new runner jar location and disable Jolokia if not needed, adapting to the new base image's run-java.sh expectations.
Set UTF-8 locale environment variables to ensure consistent character encoding in the new base image.
Explicitly expose port 8080 in the Dockerfile for documentation and container networking clarity.
Update comments to reflect the use of the Maven wrapper (./mvnw) instead of the system mvn command.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Pin the UBI minimal base image to a specific minor version to ensure build reproducibility and compatibility.
Add explicit USER instruction to run the container as a non-root user for security compliance.
Replace insecure chmod 775 with specific ownership and permission settings for the working directory.
Ensure copied application artifacts are owned by the non-root user to avoid permission errors at runtime.
Update comments to reflect the use of the Maven wrapper and removal of the docker-build flag.

src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.general_idea: Update the application version string in the HTML title from snapshot to release candidate format.
Replace the default Quarkus HTML template with a modern, styled dashboard layout including grid systems and custom fonts.
Replace legacy float-based layout with CSS Grid for the main page structure.
Update typography and spacing to match modern Quarkus branding guidelines.
Refactor responsive breakpoints to use media queries for mobile adaptation.
Update visual styling of UI components like buttons and lists.
Update the displayed Quarkus version in the welcome page to reflect the new runtime version.
Update the displayed application version in the welcome page to match the project's current version.
Replace the legacy welcome page layout and content with the modern Quarkus 2.x+ design, including new CSS grid structure, SVG logo, and updated text.
src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.human_impl: Replaced entire HTML body and style block with new grid-based layout, SVG logo, and updated copy

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Correct the capitalization of the greeting message value.
